title: Peer Attestation
description: Co-signatures over a TrackOne day Merkle root by external peers.

site_id.description: Site identifier corresponding to the day record.

day_root.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 Merkle root for the day (matches day_record.day_root).

context.description: Context string bound into the signed message (e.g. 'trackone:day-root:v1').

signatures.description: List of peer co-signatures over (context, site_id, day, day_root).

signature_hex.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature over the attestation message.

pubkey_hex.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 public key for this peer (32 bytes).
